title: SSO login failures up 23% — auth reliability risk
evidence: sso_login_failed +23% WoW (108→133). sso_login_success rate dropped from ~93% to 92.9%. PR #598 added SSO monitoring this week — failures may have been pre-existing but now visible.

title: Expense detail editing dropped 47% — likely regression
evidence: expenseDetail_upserted dropped from 130 to 69 (-47% WoW). No engineering fix shipped this week. addExpense_upserted stable at +4% WoW — creation works, editing does not.

title: MFA setup starts down 24% post form refactor
evidence: mfa_sms_setup_phone down 24% (21→16) same week PR #610 refactored MFA phone capture form. Correlation not confirmed — monitor next week.

title: AI expense extraction dismissed 3:1 — UX or quality issue
evidence: AI feedback events appeared for first time. 5 feedback events vs 16 dismissals. Feature is live and visible but users are not accepting AI suggestions.

title: FNM2 shipped 10 PRs with zero PostHog coverage — blind spot
source: GitHub: 10 PRs merged, 0 PostHog events for G2N/GTN
evidence: FNM2 merged PRs for GTN file upload, G2N mapping validation, payroll file summary API. No PostHog events exist for any of these flows. Cannot measure success or failure.

title: Contribution splits modal shipped with no tracking
source: GitHub PR #600, #580 — no PostHog events added
evidence: New modal and table for country contribution splits merged. No contribution_split_added or country_rule_configured events added. Adoption is unknown.
